geneticdef: Two increased function alleles, or more than 2 normal function alleles

functionaldef: Increased transporter function compared to normal function.
geneticdef: One or more increased function alleles
Combinations of normal function and/ or decreased function alleles

functionaldef: Decreased transporter function (function between normal and poor function)

Combination of no function alleles and/ or decreased function alleles
